title: calamus nagbettai
intro: Calamus nagbettai, also known as Alpinia nigra, is a tropical plant species belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, where it is valued for its carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing nausea, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating stress and anxiety. Calamus nagbettai is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
